description_long: This is a compact, rectangular electronic keyboard with a distinctly weathered and rusty red exterior, suggesting prolonged outdoor exposure or heavy use. The keyboard features a full set of white and black keys, many of which appear discolored and worn, with visible grime and surface corrosion. On the top panel, there are several round and rectangular control buttons, dials, and a large speaker grille, all integrated into the rugged casing. The corners and edges are reinforced with ribbed, metallic-looking guards, adding to its industrial, utilitarian appearance. The surface finish is matte and rough, with visible scratches, rust patches, and dirt accumulation. The overall design is robust, likely intended for durability in harsh urban environments.
description: A rugged, weathered electronic keyboard with a rusty red body, worn keys, and reinforced metallic corners. The surface is matte and rough, showing heavy use and outdoor exposure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard layout, worn keys, and control panel details.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ribbed metallic corner guards and the depth of the keyboard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel, large speaker grille, and absence of visible keys.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle, ribbed corners, and partial key visibility.
attribute_key_layout: Full-size with function keys, no numpad
